title: US, Israel Airstrikes Cripple Iranian Rocket, Satellite Programs
summary_full: The US and Israel have targeted infrastructure for satellites and rockets, part of an effort to destroy technology that could be used for weapons programs, an Iran expert said.
summary_public: The US and Israel have targeted infrastructure for satellites and rockets, part of an effort to destroy technology that could be used for weapons programs, an Iran expert said.
